sequencing_notes: Employee Entity Workflow is implemented by EmployeeEntityController and remains an in-scope PHP workflow during modernization. Key controller actions include __construct, getHeadline, getFormLabel, links, resetPassword, resetPwd. Primary data touchpoints include office, employee, employee_meeting_notes.

Portal Extern Workflow is implemented by PortalExternController and remains an in-scope PHP workflow during modernization. Key controller actions include __construct, localCurlGET, setSessionInfo, menuDefinition, unsetSessionInfo, createLabelString. Downstream templates or notifications include extern_main_page.php, extern_login_new.php, extern_login.php, extern_login_reset.php.

Portal Vaccination Workflow is implemented by PortalVaccinationController and remains an in-scope PHP workflow during modernization. Key controller actions include __construct, handle, handleHomePage, handleEntry, setSessionInfo, validateDetails. Downstream templates or notifications include extern_vaccination_entry.php, extern_remote_page.php, extern_already_update.php, extern_vaccination_data.php.
